description_long: This street cabinet is a large, rectangular industrial unit with a robust metal housing painted in a muted blue-green color. It features a series of horizontal reinforcement bands and a prominent vertical exhaust or vent pipe extending from the top, suggesting it is designed for ventilation or filtration purposes. On one side, there is a large curved duct or pipe inlet, while the opposite side has two smaller, flexible conduit pipes, likely for cable or airflow management. The cabinet is mounted on a flat base, elevating it slightly above ground level, and a warning label is visible on one of the side panels, indicating the presence of electrical or mechanical hazards. The overall construction appears sturdy, with visible seams and bolts reinforcing the panels. The object is likely used for housing electrical, HVAC, or filtration equipment in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, blue-green metal street cabinet with a vertical vent pipe, side ducts, and a warning label, mounted on a flat base. It features reinforced bands and multiple pipe connections, indicating industrial or utility use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main large duct opening and the vertical vent pipe rising from the top center.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the warning label, the main body with reinforcement bands, and the large curved duct on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two smaller flexible conduit pipes emerging from the base and the vertical vent pipe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the two flexible pipes and the main duct, with the vent pipe visible on top.
